hints.title: Hint 1
hints.content: In each binary search step, one half of the array is always sorted. Determine which half is sorted and check if the target falls in that range.

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: If `nums[left] <= nums[mid]`, the left half is sorted. Check if `target` is in `[nums[left], nums[mid])`. Otherwise the right half is sorted.
